# Issue #5: Remove Decorative Elements

## Objective
Remove all non-functional decorative elements to achieve a truly minimal interface.

## Requirements
1. Remove:
   - Emoji backgrounds
   - Decorative animations
   - Shadow effects (except minimal elevation)
   - Background patterns
   - Unnecessary padding/margins
2. Standardize spacing
3. Remove transition animations
4. Simplify color usage

## Success Criteria
- [ ] All decorative elements removed
- [ ] Consistent spacing throughout
- [ ] Minimal use of elevation
- [ ] Clean, functional interface
- [ ] Reduced APK size
- [ ] Improved performance metrics
- [ ] Matches design principles

## Dependencies
All previous issues should be completed first

## Testing Guidelines
1. Visual inspection of all screens
2. Performance profiling
3. APK size comparison
4. Animation/transition timing tests
5. Accessibility review
